channel.title: AI and Autonomous Systems Report
channel.description: Essays on AI systems, automation, research, and building by Mohammad Takneshan.

item.title: From research lab to Dubai operations: what transferred
item.description: A short map of skills that survived the jump into automation engineering.

item.title: MultiSent and the limits of “just fine-tune it”
item.description: When multilingual sentiment needs more than a single checkpoint and a hope.

item.title: Diabetes risk models: ROC curves and clinical restraint
item.description: What a clean dashboard can hide about thresholds and leakage.

item.title: The quiet craft of internal tools nobody demos on Twitter
item.description: WorkOS, Docker Compose, and backups over another chat UI.

item.title: What markerless motion capture taught me about evaluation honesty
item.description: Metrics that win a slide can still lose the lab. Notes from a computer-vision thesis path.

item.title: Travel Avenue, from blank repo to a storefront that must sell
item.description: Catalog, media, SEO, and the automation underneath a UAE luggage DTC channel.

item.title: How I ship AI workflows that survive contact with operations
item.description: A field guide to the gap between prototypes and the warehouse floor: n8n, AWS runbooks, and the unglamorous layer that keeps agentic tools honest.
